mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.password AS passwordHash, u.nick_name AS displayName, u.user_type AS userType, u.phone AS phone, u.email AS email, u.status AS status, u.register_status AS registerStatus, u.last_active_identity_type AS lastActiveIdentityType FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT binding.id AS bindingId, binding.user_id AS userId, binding.identity_type AS identityType, binding.identity_ref_id AS memberId, binding.status AS status, binding.is_default AS defaultIdentity, u.username AS username, COALESCE(member_account.member_name, u.nick_name, u.username) AS displayName FROM user_identity_binding binding JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = binding.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = binding.identity_ref_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 WHERE binding.deleted = 0 AND binding.id = #{bindingId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password, nick_name, user_type, member_id, phone, email, status, register_source, register_status, last_active_identity_type, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{nickName}, #{userType}, #{memberId}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{registerSource}, #{registerStatus}, #{lastActiveIdentityType}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO member_account ( member_code, member_type, member_name, phone, email, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{memberCode}, #{memberType}, #{memberName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO customer_info ( member_id, company_name, member_level, points_balance, accumulated_points, used_points, contact_name, contact_phone, invoice_title, tax_no, bank_name, bank_account, invite_code, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, COALESCE(#{companyName}, ''), COALESCE(#{memberLevel}, 'NORMAL'), COALESCE(#{pointsBalance}, 0), COALESCE(#{accumulatedPoints}, 0), COALESCE(#{usedPoints}, 0), #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, #{inviteCode}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO merchant_info ( member_id, shop_name, license_no, contact_name, contact_phone, shop_desc, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{shopName}, NULL, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO supplier_info ( member_id, supplier_name, qualification_file_id, contact_name, contact_phone, supply_desc, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{supplierName}, NULL, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO user_identity_binding ( user_id, identity_type, identity_ref_id, status, is_default, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{identityType}, #{memberId}, #{status}, #{defaultIdentity}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(binding.id AS CHAR) AS id, binding.identity_type AS identityType, COALESCE(member_account.member_name, u.nick_name, u.username) AS displayName, u.username AS username, COALESCE(u.phone, '-') AS phone, COALESCE(u.email, '-') AS email, binding.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(binding.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM user_identity_binding binding JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = binding.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = binding.identity_ref_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 WHERE binding.deleted = 0 AND binding.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY binding.created_time DESC, binding.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
